subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-08-22 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: There was another Baktashi who, in his younger days, was an officer in the Turkish government. This man became very sick, and the members of his family had summoned a Mullah to his bed.
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @empty learning; false spirituality, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @religious rituals minimized or eliminated
